# Axia

> Freelance rate intelligence. Real market data on what clients actually pay
> independent designers, developers, photographers, copywriters, and brand
> designers — by city, by skill, by experience tier. Built from BLS OEWS data,
> freelance job board scraping, and contributor-submitted real rates.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://axiaradar.com): Interactive rate explorer with P25/P50/P75/P90 distributions for major freelance categories across US metro areas
- [Contribute](https://axiaradar.com/contribute): Submit your real rate quarterly to get free Pro access while contributing
- [FAQ](https://axiaradar.com/faq): Common questions about freelance pricing methodology

## Methodology

Axia blends three data sources with different biases:
- **BLS OEWS** (Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Employment Statistics): W-2 employee comp, public; serves as the floor.
- **Freelance job boards**: advertised/aspirational rates from public listings; high but biased upward.
- **Contributor submissions**: real rates that hit freelancer bank accounts; smallest N but highest fidelity.

Published percentiles require N≥5 per (skill × city × tier) cell. Submissions older than 12 months are deweighted. Outliers are winsorized at p5/p95. IPs are HMAC-hashed for abuse correlation, never stored raw.

## About

Founded 2026 by Sergio Ordonez. Single-member LLC structure under Cordillera Ventures LLC (Delaware). Currently in waitlist/beta phase.

## Contact

- Web: https://axiaradar.com
- Email: hello@axiaradar.com

## Sample data

### Senior UX Designer, Austin TX
- P25: $95/hr
- P50: $125/hr
- P75: $160/hr
- P90: $195/hr
- Freelance recommendation: $135–$175/hr
- Sample size: 23
- Data vintage: May 2024 (BLS OEWS) + 2025 contributor data

### Mid React Developer, San Francisco CA
- P25: $95/hr
- P50: $125/hr
- P75: $165/hr
- P90: $210/hr
- Freelance recommendation: $140–$185/hr
- Sample size: 41
- Data vintage: May 2024 (BLS OEWS) + 2025 contributor data

### Senior Brand Designer, New York NY
- P25: $110/hr
- P50: $150/hr
- P75: $195/hr
- P90: $250/hr
- Freelance recommendation: $165–$220/hr
- Sample size: 31
- Data vintage: May 2024 (BLS OEWS) + 2025 contributor data

### Mid Photographer, Los Angeles CA
- P25: $85/hr
- P50: $120/hr
- P75: $165/hr
- P90: $220/hr
- Freelance recommendation: $130–$180/hr
- Sample size: 18
- Data vintage: May 2024 (BLS OEWS) + 2025 contributor data

### Senior Copywriter, Brooklyn NY
- P25: $95/hr
- P50: $130/hr
- P75: $170/hr
- P90: $215/hr
- Freelance recommendation: $145–$190/hr
- Sample size: 27
- Data vintage: May 2024 (BLS OEWS) + 2025 contributor data
